name: Kubernetes Namespace Without Default Deny NetworkPolicy
description: Namespace does not have a default-deny NetworkPolicy, allowing unrestricted pod-to-pod traffic
conditions: network_policies NOT ANY (spec.pod_selector == {} AND spec.policy_types CONTAINS 'Ingress' AND spec.ingress == null)
remediation: Create a default-deny NetworkPolicy for ingress traffic. Add specific allow policies for required communication paths. Consider using a service mesh for mTLS.
